name: ebook-publishing-system
description: Markdown 원고를 입력하면 PDF/DOCX/미리보기/이미지까지 생산하는 전자책 출판 시스템

scripts.build:chapter-assets: npm run build:canvas:chapters && npm run export:png:chapters
scripts.build:assets: npm run build:canvas && npm run export:png
scripts.build:assets:sparse: npm run build:canvas:sparse && npm run export:png:sparse
scripts.build:release:legacy: npm run build:html && npm run build:assets && npm run export:pdf
scripts.test: node test/parser.test.ts && node test/pages.test.ts && node test/components.test.ts && node test/layout.test.ts && node test/html-renderer.test.ts && node test/theme-engine.test.ts && node test/canvas.test.ts && node test/selector.test.ts && node test/book-selector-integration.test.ts && node test/export.test.ts && node test/scripts.test.ts && node test/chapter-canvas.test.ts && node test/output-isolation.test.ts
